ideas.name: Regime avoidance: reduce in trending
ideas.description: Raise confidence floor by 10% and reduce max position count when regime is 'trending' to avoid losses.
ideas.expected_edge: Avoid ~30-50% of losing trades in 'trending' regime
ideas.source_pattern: Overtrading in losing regime: 'trending' has 0% WR but accounts for 33% of trades (10/30)

ideas.name: Regime avoidance: reduce in trending
ideas.description: Raise confidence floor by 10% and reduce max position count when regime is 'trending' to avoid losses.
ideas.expected_edge: Avoid ~30-50% of losing trades in 'trending' regime
ideas.source_pattern: Weak performance in 'trending' regime: 0% WR over 10 trades

ideas.name: Regime-aware sizing: boost in choppy
ideas.description: Increase position size by 20% and lower confidence floor by 5% when regime is 'choppy', based on observed edge.
ideas.expected_edge: Capture more trades in high-WR regime 'choppy'
ideas.source_pattern: Strong edge in 'choppy' regime: 100% WR over 10 trades (overall: 67%)

ideas.name: Regime-aware sizing: boost in ranging
ideas.description: Increase position size by 20% and lower confidence floor by 5% when regime is 'ranging', based on observed edge.
ideas.expected_edge: Capture more trades in high-WR regime 'ranging'
ideas.source_pattern: Strong edge in 'ranging' regime: 100% WR over 10 trades (overall: 67%)

ideas.name: Lower confidence floor to capture hidden edge
ideas.description: Reduce the confidence floor by 5% to capture moderate-confidence trades that historically win.
ideas.expected_edge: Capture profitable trades currently filtered out
ideas.source_pattern: Hidden edge at lower confidence: 70-80% confidence signals actually win 65% of the time over 20 trades
